summary: All cloud LLM providers degraded. Only Ollama (emergency local) and Claude CLI (dev session only) available.

providers.name: claude_cli
providers.notes: Available only during active Claude Code sessions — not available to Discord bot or cron
providers.recommended_action: none — inherent limitation of CLI tool

providers.name: cc_sdk
providers.notes: Available only during active Claude Code sessions via OAuth token inheritance

providers.name: gemini
providers.notes: Free tier RPM/RPD exhausted. Key present (39 chars).
providers.recommended_action: Upgrade to Gemini paid billing or wait for daily reset

providers.name: groq
providers.notes: Tokens-per-day limit reached. Key present (56 chars).
providers.recommended_action: Wait for daily TPD reset or upgrade Groq plan

providers.name: anthropic
providers.notes: API key set in umh.env (108 chars) but empty in .env and services/.env. Needs credits.

providers.name: perplexity
providers.recommended_action: Upgrade Perplexity plan or wait for quota reset

providers.name: ollama
providers.notes: Emergency local fallback. qwen2.5:0.5b (397MB). Minimal capability.

providers.name: openai
providers.notes: Key present (164 chars) but not in model_router fallback chain.
providers.recommended_action: Could be added to fallback chain if needed

deterministic_fallback.description: Rules/regex/lookup tables produce template responses when all providers fail
deterministic_fallback.coverage: greeting, question, command, status, analysis, schedule, send
